html:
Exclusive to:

Switcherdoodles are 7 character-exclusive Items craftable by Webber in the Survivor Items Filter, only in Don't Starve Together.

In order to unlock the recipe, Webber needs to befriend the Spider type he wants to make a Switcherdoodle of.

Switcherdoodles don't work if the spider type is the same as the Switcherdoodle, for example: A Warrior Switcherdoodle won't work if the Spider is already a warrior.

If a hat is on the spider it will be removed after the transformation and will have to be put back on manually.

They can also be eaten by any survivor (with the exception of Wurt), recovering a small amount of hunger, but also reducing their health and sanity. Because they are considered a type of Monster Meat, Webber will not receive any drawbacks from eating them, and Woodie will transform into a random Wereform after eating 2 of them. While they cannot be fed to Pigs directly, they will eat them off of the ground, and transform into Werepigs after eating 4 of them.

Contents

  • 1 Warrior Switcherdoodle
  • 2 Dangler Switcherdoodle
  • 3 Cave Switcherdoodle
  • 4 Spitter Switcherdoodle
  • 5 Shatter Switcherdoodle
  • 6 Nurse Switcherdoodle
  • 7 Strider Switcherdoodle
  • 8 Gallery
  • 9 Trivia
  • 10 References

Warrior Switcherdoodle

“We just know they're going to love it!”

–Webber

When fed to any type of spider it will transform it into a Spider Warrior and befriend them.

Dangler Switcherdoodle

“Who wants a cookie?”

–Webber

When fed to any type of spider it will transform it into a Dangling Depth Dweller and befriend them.

Cave Switcherdoodle

“We came up with the recipe all by ourselves!”

–Webber

When fed to any type of spider it will transform it into a Cave Spider and befriend them.

Spitter Switcherdoodle

“We made it look just like our friend!”

–Webber

When fed to any type of spider it will transform it into a Spitter and befriend them.

Shatter Switcherdoodle

“We made this cookie special!”

–Webber

When fed to any type of spider it will transform it into a Shattered Spider and befriend them.

Nurse Switcherdoodle

“Doesn't it look tasty?”

–Webber

When fed to any type of spider it will transform it into a Nurse Spider and befriend them.

Strider Switcherdoodle

“This one turned out really good!”

–Webber

When fed to any type of spider it will transform it into a Sea Strider and befriend them.

Gallery

  • Spider eat Switcherdoodle animation from Rhymes With Play #281.
  • Spider eat Switcherdoodle concept art animation from Rhymes With Play #281.
  • Switcherdoodle concept art from Rhymes With Play #281.
  • Switcherdoodle concept art from Rhymes With Play #281.
  • Sea Strider Switcherdoodle concept art from Rhymes With Play #282.[1]
  • Sea Strider Switcherdoodle concept art from Rhymes With Play #282.

Trivia

  • Switcherdoodles were introduced in the Webber Character Update as part of the character overhaul for Don't Starve Together.
  • The Switcherdoodles are a portmanteau of "snickerdoodle" cookies and "switch".
  • All survivors can feed the Switcherdoodles to any type of spiders.
  • Before the the March 2022 QoL update Switcherdoodles were available under the Spider Care Tab.

References

  1. ↑ Rhymes With Play #282

plainText:
Exclusive to:
“Oh wow, that looks um... delicious, Webber!”
–Wilson
“Give one to Wilson, I'm sure he'd loooove to try it! Heheh.”
–Willow
“Tiny spider will be crushed in Wolfgang's mighty jaws! Or maybe not.”
–Wolfgang
“Very well, since you made the cookies you can bring one spider friend to our tea party.”
–Wendy
“IT IS CRUDE AND DISGUSTING. AN ACCURATE DEPICTION”
–WX-78
“How interesting! It appear to alter an arachnid's form when ingested.”
–Wickerbottom
“Sorry little buddy, I think I'll have to pass.”
–Woodie
“I'm not eating that.”
–Maxwell
“They löok like the little beasts, but lack the feröcity.”
–Wigfrid
“They're perfect!”
–Webber
“Next time, let's bake something together, non?”
–Warly
“Belly stuff for Leggy Bugs?”
–Wormwood
“I don't think I'll be takin' a bite out of that.”
–Winona
“A tasty treat for those tiny terrors!”
–Wortox
“Webby boy make Merm cookie next!!”
–Wurt
“Hey, cookies! Um... what are these made of, exactly?”
–Walter
“Those are definitely not cookies.”
–Wanda
Switcherdoodles are 7 character-exclusive Items craftable by Webber in the Survivor Items Filter, only in Don't Starve Together.
In order to unlock the recipe, Webber needs to befriend the Spider type he wants to make a Switcherdoodle of.
Switcherdoodles don't work if the spider type is the same as the Switcherdoodle, for example: A Warrior Switcherdoodle won't work if the Spider is already a warrior.
If a hat is on the spider it will be removed after the transformation and will have to be put back on manually.
They can also be eaten by any survivor (with the exception of Wurt), recovering a small amount of hunger, but also reducing their health and sanity. Because they are considered a type of Monster Meat, Webber will not receive any drawbacks from eating them, and Woodie will transform into a random Wereform after eating 2 of them. While they cannot be fed to Pigs directly, they will eat them off of the ground, and transform into Werepigs after eating 4 of them.

Switcherdoodles were introduced in the Webber Character Update as part of the character overhaul for Don't Starve Together.
The Switcherdoodles are a portmanteau of "snickerdoodle" cookies and "switch".
All survivors can feed the Switcherdoodles to any type of spiders.
Before the the March 2022 QoL update Switcherdoodles were available under the Spider Care Tab.

Um... what are these made of, exactly? |wanda = Those are definitely not cookies. |choose = wendy}} '''Switcherdoodles''' are 7 character-exclusive [[Item]]s craftable by [[Webber]] in the [[Survivor Items Filter]], only in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. In order to unlock the recipe, Webber needs to befriend the Spider type he wants to make a Switcherdoodle of. Switcherdoodles don't work if the spider type is the same as the Switcherdoodle, for example: A Warrior Switcherdoodle won't work if the Spider is already a warrior. If a hat is on the spider it will be removed after the transformation and will have to be put back on manually. They can also be eaten by any survivor (with the exception of Wurt), recovering a small amount of hunger, but also reducing their health and sanity. Because they are considered a type of Monster Meat, Webber will not receive any drawbacks from eating them, and [[Woodie]] will transform into a random Wereform after eating 2 of them.
